title: codereview: module docstring should explicitly reference current_channel in wire format diagram
description: Top level module docstring mentions current_channel but could include it in the initial description like the Rust version does with ASCII diagram. P4 docs. python/src/lichen/announce/messages.py:3. Related to hjo8 codereview.
close_reason: Updated top-level module docstring to explicitly reference current_channel in wire format diagram and initial description (P4 docs fix). Matched spec/05-routing.md style and Rust consistency. ruff lint and pytest test_messages.py both pass. Related to hjo8 codereview.
